Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Okay, this is my area of expertise, so lemme give you some pointers.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}First off, think of something to talk about—something they might be interested in.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Give 'em an easy question to get the ball rollin'. That's the golden rule.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Once you get started, you'll be goin' back and forth like you're playin' catch.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I'll start things off, then you ask the questions, alright?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Don't worry, I got this! Watch and learn.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}So ladies, are you in college? Or maybe you're already working?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}You guys seem a little young. Are you still in high school?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}High school kids vacationing in Yakushima? That kind of pisses me off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}...Seriously? You sure look like high schoolers from here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}High school kids vacationing in Yakushima? That kind of pisses me off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}We're only here because we were invited to our friend's vacation home.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Wow, a vacation home in Yakushima? Good for your friend.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}We, on the other hand, had to save up our own money to come here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Oh, that's a pretty big accomplishment, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}...So, what do you guys want, anyway?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Ugh, don't encourage them. They'll go away if we ignore 'em.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}How can you blame us for wanting to talk to such beauties?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Come on, give us a chance. How 'bout a walk on the beach?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}What about you, Sanada-san!? If that's how you feel, then show us how it's done![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}Why do I have to show you anything?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}Well, you said this was an operation, didn't you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}Aren't we supposed to work together in order to succeed?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 1 25 25}Fine, I'll give it a shot. I'm sure I'll do better than you at least.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}Can you give me a hand, {f 4 1}? I'll go ahead and set the pace.[n]{f 1 1}
